_note: Colors of the Soul (piece 5) — SELF-DRIVEN looping 'auto' timeline (live piano, no audio clock, loops seamlessly). Brief: KALEIDOSCOPE of colour, leaning YELLOW & GREEN (hues we haven't used elsewhere). Rich 10-colour ring (yellow/green/lime/teal weighted, with amber + a violet accent) cycling 3x per loop; the 3 mirrored Spiider stacks sit at offset colour phases so several hues are on stage at once = kaleidoscope. Lively mirrored movement. Mirrored pairs: right pan = 1 - left. Keep t=0 == t=T for a seamless loop.
